---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: Mehreen676
---

## ✨ Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or implementation approach.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Cases

Describe specific use cases for this feature:

1. **Use Case 1**: ...
2. **Use Case 2**: ...

## 📸 Mockups/References

If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or references to similar features in other projects.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## 🎨 Design Considerations

Any UI/UX considerations for this feature?
